title: User input flows into file path operation
description: A superglobal or $params value is used to construct a file path for read/write/delete without traversal protection.
explanation: User-controlled path segments enable directory traversal (../) to read/write/delete arbitrary files on the server.
fix: Use basename() to strip path components, or realpath() + str_starts_with() to verify the resolved path stays within the allowed directory.
